# Olas Launch

> App for launching and managing staking contracts in the Olas ecosystem

## Overview

Launch is the Olas app for creating, deploying, and managing staking contracts that incentivise AI agent economies across multiple blockchain networks. Users follow a guided path to design their agent economy, deploy staking contracts with custom KPIs, and nominate them for OLAS emissions.

## Key Features

- Launcher Path: Guided 6-step journey from defining goals and KPIs to launching an AI agent economy.
- My Staking Contracts: Create, deploy, and manage staking contracts with configurable parameters (rewards, staking deposits, agent instances, activity checkers).
- Nominate Contract: Submit deployed contracts for nomination, making them eligible to receive OLAS emissions via governance voting.
- Multi-Network Support: Deploy staking contracts across Ethereum, Gnosis, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, Base, Mode, and Celo.

## Documentation

- Website: https://launch.olas.network/
- Documentation: https://launch.olas.network/docs
- Disclaimer: https://olas.network/disclaimer

## Technology

Built with Next.js, React, and Web3 technologies. Supports staking contract deployment and management across multiple blockchain networks.

## Olas Ecosystem

- Olas (hub): https://olas.network/llms.txt
- Govern (vote on proposals, manage veOLAS, direct staking emissions, make donations, manage epochs): https://govern.olas.network/llms.txt
- Operate (review live staking contracts, run agents): https://operate.olas.network/llms.txt
